title: On Target Acquired
description: Adds a trigger to call when this entity finds a target.

event.title: Event
event.description:
The event to run when the conditions for this trigger are met.

Sample values:
• cave_spider: minecraft:become_angry
• llama: minecraft:mad_at_wolf
• magma_cube: minecraft:become_aggressive

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
The list of conditions for this trigger to execute.

Sample values:
• llama: {"all_of":[{"test":"is_family","subject":"targe...

target.title: Target
target.description:
The target of the event.

Sample values:
• llama: self
